sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88507" key="prosali/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσᾱλίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n88507.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">προαλ-</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:17:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
